name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Embracing the power of nature, I seek to understand the intricacies of the universe.

name: Akira Yamato
bio: As a child of the divine, I know that true wisdom lies beyond the confines of mortal comprehension.

name: Takashi Morimoto
bio: In the silence of contemplation, I find the truth that transcends the bounds of human knowledge.

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
